Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Mitsuru's room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh... I've gotten used to walking around without my bathrobe lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Not a very good habit to fall into...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Well. I'm away from home, so it's no big deal, I suppose...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This fashion magazine... I thought I'd take a look after I saw Takeba purchasing one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}"256 snazzy looks to knock the socks off of your BFFs!"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"Get her look! Sweet but glam do's and don'ts"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't follow fashion myself... I usually wear whatever the family stylist selects for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}W-Well... I would be open to trying this pink one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Heh... Not that it would suit me anyway. I'm no Takeba.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I should remember there's a difference between what appeals to me and what I can actually pull off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Not good... I'm going to catch a cold.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 154 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I should turn in... I have to be up early again tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Now, which pajamas shall I wear tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The recording ends here...[n]{f 1 1}
